title: MetaMask Perps lifecycle smoke
description: Reusable Recipe v1 smoke that proves a deterministic Perps prestate, opens a small ETH testnet position, verifies it, closes it, and tears down to a clean state.

status.detail: Confirm the selected MetaMask adapter is connected before trading.

fixture.detail: Check the preseeded wallet fixture required for deterministic Perps validation.

wallet-setup.intent: Ensure wallet fixture setup is ready
wallet-setup.detail: Confirm onboarding and fixture state before controlling the app.

wallet-unlock.detail: Unlock only if the app is currently locked.

select-account.detail: Use the deterministic testnet account shared by mobile and extension.

wallet-read-state.detail: Record selected account/network state before the Perps lifecycle.

navigate-perps.intent: Navigate to Perps with raw platform routing
navigate-perps.detail: Mobile consumes route=PerpsMarketListView; extension consumes hash=#/?tab=perps.

navigate-market.intent: Open the ETH Perps market with raw platform routing
navigate-market.detail: Mobile consumes route=params; extension consumes hash=#/perps/market/ETH.

start-state.intent: Prepare clean ETH testnet Perps state
start-state.detail: Close existing ETH testnet positions and orders before the smoke lifecycle starts.

assert-clean-position.intent: Confirm ETH position state is clean
assert-clean-position.detail: Assert lifecycle starts with no ETH Perps position.

assert-clean-orders.intent: Confirm ETH order state is clean
assert-clean-orders.detail: Assert lifecycle starts with no ETH Perps orders.

place-order.intent: Open a small ETH 3x long position
place-order.detail: Place an approximately $11 real testnet market order through the Perps controller.

assert-open.detail: Verify the lifecycle created a real position before cleanup.

read-orders.detail: Collect order state proof before lifecycle teardown.

close-orders.intent: Close ETH orders from the lifecycle
close-orders.detail: Cancel any open ETH orders selected by the recipe parameters.

close-position.detail: Close the position created by this smoke and wait for clean state.

assert-closed.detail: Assert no ETH position remains after lifecycle cleanup.

teardown-state.intent: Return Perps to globally clean home state
teardown-state.detail: Close remaining ETH positions and orders so the lifecycle leaves its selected market clean.

done.detail: The recipe opened and closed a real ETH testnet position.
